recalls.Description: The Sefudun 5% Minoxidil Hair Growth Serum Kit is being recalled due to safety concerns related to its packaging. The product is presented in a black glass bottle with a black and golden dropper cap, featuring a label that states "SEFUDUN HAIR GROWTH SERUM" and "BIOTIN 5% MINOXIDIL." A black plastic applicator is also included in the kit. The lack of child-resistant packaging poses a significant risk of serious injury or even death if ingested by children.
recalls.Title: Sefudun 5% Minoxidil Hair Growth Serum Kits Recalled Due to Child Poisoning Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, reach out to Nengmiaokeji at sesuall@outlook.com.

Products.Name: Sefudun 5% Minoxidil Hair Growth Serum Kit

Images.Caption: Recalled Sefudun 5% Minoxidil Hair Growth Serum Kit for Men
Recalled Sefudun 5% Minoxidil Hair Growth Serum Kit for Men Packaging (Box Side)
Recalled Sefudun 5% Minoxidil Hair Growth Serum Kit for Men Packaging (Box Back)
Recalled Sefudun 5% Minoxidil Hair Growth Serum Kit for Men Packaging (Bottle Back)

Retailers.Name: Available online at Amazon.com from December 2023 to August 2025, priced around $15.

Hazards.Name: Non-child-resistant packaging leading to potential poisoning hazards for children

Remedies.Name: Consumers should keep the serum out of children's reach and contact Nengmiaokeji for a complimentary replacement. They will need to dispose of the serum and provide photographic evidence of the empty bottle in the trash.

recalls.metaDescription: Sefudun 5% Minoxidil Hair Growth Serum Kits recalled due to child poisoning risks. Contact for free replacement and safety guidance.

recalls.Description: McLee Creations is recalling MyOnlyStyler Root Booster Hair Dryers due to significant safety risks. These hair dryers, identifiable by their white color with black bristles and the "MY ONLY STYLER" label on the handle, pose a serious electrocution hazard if they come into contact with water while plugged in. The model number "MOS-22" can be found on the back of the handle, and the device measures 12 inches in length and 1.75 inches in width.
recalls.Title: Recall of MyOnlyStyler Root Booster Hair Dryers Due to Electrocution and Shock Hazards
recalls.ConsumerContact: For further details, please visit www.myonlystyler.com and select "Product Recalls" or go directly to https://www.myonlystyler.com/product-recalls.

Images.Caption: Recalled MyOnlyStyler Root Booster Hair Dryer with the power cord cut in half for disposal

Retailers.Name: Available online at Amazon.com from November 2022 to October 2025, priced between $50 and $60.

Importers.Name: McLee Creations LLC, of Valencia, California

Hazards.Name: Risk of electrocution or shock due to lack of immersion protection

Remedies.Name: Consumers should immediately unplug the hair dryer and cease usage, then contact McLee Creations for a full refund. A photo of the hair dryer with the power cord cut in half must be submitted via the recall registration portal at https://www.myonlystyler.com/product-recall-registration/, along with following the disposal instructions on https://www.myonlystyler.com/product-recalls.

recalls.metaDescription: McLee Creations recalls MyOnlyStyler Root Booster Hair Dryers due to serious electrocution risks. Learn how to get a refund.

recalls.Description: The recall pertains to the Bio Ionic One-Inch-Long Barrel Curling Iron, model number LXT-CL-1.0, with date codes ranging from 0722 to 1223. This curling iron features a black handle and barrel, measuring approximately 15.8 inches in length, 2.87 inches in height, and 1.65 inches in width, and weighs around 15 ounces. The handle displays a blue BIOIONIC logo along with a black label containing operating instructions. You can find the model number on the rating label on the handle, while the date code is engraved on the plug prongs in MMYY format, indicating the month and year.
recalls.Title: J & D Brush Issues Recall for Bio Ionic Curling Iron Due to Burn Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, contact Bio Ionic at their toll-free number 877-853-9627, available from 10 a.m. to 4 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday. You can also reach them via email at longbarrelsupport@bbicompany.com or visit www.bioionic.com and click on 'Product Recalls' at the bottom of the page for further details.

Products.Name: Bio Ionic One-Inch-Long Barrel Curling Iron
Products.NumberOfUnits: About 357,000 (In addition, about 3,000 were sold in Canada)

Images.Caption: Recalled Hair Curling Iron
Date code etched on prong of recalled hair curling iron plug
Rating label on recalled hair curling iron

Injuries.Name: The firm has received 258 reports of the curling iron barrel detaching, including six minor burn injuries.

Retailers.Name: Available on Amazon and Bioionic.com, as well as in-store and online at Salon Centric, Ulta, Sephora, Nordstrom, and various salons and beauty supply stores nationwide from August 2022 through July 2024, priced around $165.

Importers.Name: J & D Brush Co., LLC of Commack, New York

Hazards.Name: Burn hazard due to potential detachment of the curling iron barrel

Remedies.Name: Stop using the curling iron immediately, unplug it, and contact Bio Ionic for a free replacement. Consumers must cut off the plug and return it to the company using a prepaid shipping label.

recalls.metaDescription: J & D Brush recalls Bio Ionic Curling Iron due to burn hazards. Stop using immediately and contact for a free replacement.

recalls.Description: Sauna360 is recalling specific bench seating in their Tylö Halmstad and Kiruna Hybrid sauna models due to a risk of collapse that may lead to falls. The serial numbers for these sauna rooms can be located on the packaging and within the sauna units themselves. For the Halmstad models 2, 3, and 4, the serial number is found beneath the upper bench on the left side, while the Kiruna Hybrid models 2 and 3 have their serial numbers on the right wall, below the upper bench's right side. The model number can be referenced in the user manual.
recalls.Title: Sauna360 Issues Recall for Tylö Halmstad and Kiruna Hybrid Saunas Due to Potential Fall Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach Sauna360 at 888-780-4427 from 8 a.m. to 5 p.m. CT, Monday through Friday, email at us_techsupport@sauna360.com, or visit https://sauna360.com/product-recall for further details.

Images.Caption: Recalled Sauna Model Tylö Halmstad 2
Recalled Sauna Model Tylö Halmstad 3
Recalled Sauna Model Tylö Halmstad 4
Recalled Sauna Model Kiruna Hybrid 2
Recalled Sauna Model Kiruna Hybrid 3

Injuries.Name: Sauna360 has received seven reports of the benches breaking, including one consumer with head and neck injuries.

Retailers.Name: Available through various distributors across the country from July 2024 to December 2024, priced between $6,000 and $12,000.

Hazards.Name: Risk of bench collapse leading to falls

Remedies.Name: Consumers should cease using the benches immediately and contact Sauna360 for a complimentary repair. A professional installer will retrofit the benches with added hardware, and a revised product manual detailing the weight limit will be provided.

recalls.metaDescription: Sauna360 recalls Tylö Halmstad and Kiruna Hybrid Saunas due to a fall hazard. Contact for free repairs and safety updates.

recalls.Description: The Living Glow five-in-one portable waist fan, model CP-WFLED01, is being recalled due to a potential fire hazard. This model, identifiable by its label on the back, includes five fan speeds, a three-mode flashlight, and functions as a power bank. Available in various colors such as gray, white, aqua, coral, red, and sage green, the fan measures approximately 3.6 inches wide by 4 inches tall and features a metal clip and a neck strap for convenience.
recalls.Title: Recall of Living Glow Portable Waist Fans Due to Fire Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For further details, consumers can reach out to Guangzhou Jiguang Lighting at support@waistfanrecall.info or visit https://www.waistfanrecall.info.

Products.Name: Living Glow five-in-one portable waist fan

Images.Caption: Recalled Rechargeable Portable Waist Fan (green)
Recalled Rechargeable Portable Waist Fan (white)
Recalled Rechargeable Portable Waist Fan (red)
Recalled Rechargeable Portable Waist Fan (aqua)
Recalled Rechargeable Portable Waist Fan (sage green)
Recalled Rechargeable Portable Waist Fan (coral)
Label on Back of Recalled Rechargeable Portable Waist Fan

Injuries.Name: The firm has received four reports of the portable waist fan melting or catching fire. No injuries or property damage have been reported.

Manufacturers.Name: Guangzhou Jiguang Lighting Co. Ltd., of Guangzhou, China

Retailers.Name: Available on HSN.com and through the HSN television network from May 2025 to July 2025, priced between $20 and $25.

Hazards.Name: Overheating lithium-ion batteries posing a fire risk

Remedies.Name: Stop using the fan immediately and register at https://www.waistfanrecall.info for a full refund. Follow the provided instructions to disable the fan and dispose of it according to local regulations.

recalls.metaDescription: Living Glow portable waist fans recalled for fire hazard. Stop using immediately and register for a refund.

recalls.Description: Mad Rabbit is recalling its "RELIEVE" numbing cream, which is packaged in a short, wide-mouthed white container. The front label features the product name in bold black letters along with the company's logo and additional details such as "Numbing Cream" and "Menthol" in smaller text. This product poses a significant risk to young children due to non-compliance with child-resistant packaging standards.
recalls.Title: Mad Rabbit Issues Recall for "RELIEVE" Lidocaine Numbing Cream Due to Child Safety Hazard
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers should reach out to Mad Rabbit at product@madrabbit.com or visit https://www.madrabbit.com/pages/product-recalls for further details. They can also use the contact form at https://www.madrabbit.com/pages/contact-us and select "Product Recall".

Images.Caption: Recalled RELIEVE Numbing Cream – Outer Packaging
Recalled RELIEVE Numbing Cream

Retailers.Name: Available at trade shows, tattoo shops, and online at MadRabbit.com from October 2024 through August 2025 for approximately $26.

Distributors.Name: Mad Rabbit Inc., of Los Angeles, California

Hazards.Name: Risk of serious injury or death from poisoning due to non-child-resistant packaging.

Remedies.Name: Request a free child-resistant lid for safe storage and keep the product out of children's reach.

recalls.metaDescription: Mad Rabbit recalls "RELIEVE" Lidocaine Numbing Cream due to child safety risks. Learn how to secure your product safely.

recalls.Description: IcyBreeze is recalling its Buddy portable misting fan due to a potential fire hazard. This battery-operated fan features a 1.5-liter water tank and can be powered by either AC or a rechargeable lithium-ion battery, providing up to 7 hours of misting. The fan is marked with "ICYBREEZE" and is available in slate blue, gray, and seafoam colors. Proper disposal of the recalled lithium-ion battery is crucial, as it poses a higher fire risk than standard batteries. Consumers should not discard it in regular trash or recycling bins but instead consult their local hazardous waste collection center for guidance on safe disposal.
recalls.Title: IcyBreeze Buddy Portable Misting Fans Recalled Due to Fire Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For more information, contact IcyBreeze at 817-900-2664 from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. CT Monday through Friday, email support@icybreeze.com, or visit https://www.icybreeze.com and click on "Recalls" at the bottom of the page or go to https://www.icybreeze.com/buddy-recall-information.

Images.Caption: Recalled IcyBreeze Buddy Portable Misting Fan in slate blue

Injuries.Name: The firm has received seven reports of the misting fan overheating while charging, with two of those reports resulting in fire. No injuries have been reported.

Retailers.Name: Available online at www.icybreeze.com and Amazon.com from November 2023 through August 2024 for approximately $150.

Importers.Name: IcyBreeze Cooling LLC, of Grapevine, Texas

Hazards.Name: Fire hazard due to overheating while charging

Remedies.Name: Stop using the fan, visit the recall website for instructions, and submit a form with a photo of the cut power cord for a $150 credit.

recalls.metaDescription: IcyBreeze recalls Buddy portable misting fans due to fire hazards. Stop using and visit the recall page for details.

recalls.Description: Empower Brands has announced a recall of its Remington Hair Dryers, specifically model D3190DCDN. These hair dryers are purple with black accents and feature three black operating buttons on the handle. The product measures approximately 8.5 inches in length, 11.6 inches in height, and 3.6 inches in width, weighing around 1.5 pounds. The Remington logo is displayed in white on the side of the device.
recalls.Title: Empower Brands Issues Recall for Remington Hair Dryers Due to Electrocution and Shock Hazards
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers are urged to stop using the recalled hair dryers immediately and unplug them. For a full refund, contact Empower Brands at 1-844-695-2134, available from 9 a.m. to 5:30 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday. You can also email HairdryerRecall@Spectrumbrands.com or visit https://www.remingtonproducts.com/product-recalls for more details.

Images.Caption: Recalled Remington Hair Dryer

Retailers.Name: Available at Walmart Marketplace, Target Marketplace, and Amazon from March 2024 to June 2025, priced between $25 and $32.

Importers.Name: Spectrum Brands Inc. for the benefit of Empower Brands, LLC, both of Middleton, Wisconsin

Hazards.Name: Risk of electrocution or shock due to lack of immersion protection

Remedies.Name: Full refund upon submission of a photo of the hair dryer with the power cord cut

recalls.metaDescription: Recall alert: Empower Brands recalls Remington Hair Dryers due to serious electrocution risks. Learn how to get a refund.

recalls.Description: The Séfralls Hair Generation Serum has been recalled due to serious safety concerns. This product is packaged in an amber dropper bottle featuring a white and gold dropper, along with a label that includes the names "Séfralls" and "Minoxidil" prominently displayed. The current packaging does not meet the required child-resistant standards, which poses a significant risk of poisoning for young children if ingested.
recalls.Title: Séfralls Minoxidil Hair Generation Serum Recalled Due to Child Poisoning Risk; Non-Compliant Packaging
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers are urged to contact Guangzhou Ariel Biotech via email at sefralls@outlook.com for further instructions.

Images.Caption: Recalled Séfralls Minoxidil Hair Generation Serum
Recalled Séfralls Minoxidil Hair Generation Serum

Manufacturers.Name: Guangzhou Ariel Biotech Co. Ltd., of China

Retailers.Name: Available on Amazon from June 2024 through June 2025 for approximately $1.

Importers.Name: Guangzhou Ariel Biotech Co. Ltd, dba Ariel Biotech of China

Hazards.Name: Non-compliant packaging that fails to protect against child poisoning risks.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should securely store the serum out of children's reach and reach out to Guangzhou Ariel Biotech for guidance on disposing of the product and obtaining a replacement.

recalls.metaDescription: Séfralls Hair Generation Serum recalled for child safety violations. Contact Guangzhou Ariel Biotech for disposal and replacement instructions.

recalls.Description: Pura Scents is recalling the detachable covers of its Pura 4 Smart Home Fragrance Diffusers due to a potential ingestion hazard. Each cover contains five magnets—three small and two larger ones. The diffusers are approximately 4 inches by 4 inches, and the serial numbers for the affected units range from JX230000001 to JX230801425 and JX240000001 to JX240049959. The serial number can be found on the rear label above the metal prongs.
recalls.Title: Pura Scents Issues Recall for Smart Home Fragrance Diffuser Covers Due to Magnet Ingestion Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach Pura Scents at 855-394-5292 from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. MT, Monday through Friday, email replacement@pura.com, or visit http://www.pura.com/pages/productrecall or www.pura.com and click on 'Recall' at the bottom of the page.

Products.Name: Pura 4 Smart Home Fragrance Diffuser Cover
Products.NumberOfUnits: About 851,400 (In addition, 1,100 were sold in Canada)

Images.Caption: Recalled Pura 4 Smart Home Fragrance Diffuser with detachable cover
Recalled Pura 4 Smart Home Fragrance Diffuser Cover
Recalled Pura 4 Smart Home Fragrance Diffuser with detachable cover serial location

Injuries.Name: The firm has received three reports of the magnets detaching from the cover. No injuries have been reported.

Retailers.Name: Available at Pura.com, Amazon.com, Target.com, Scheels.com, and in Target, Scheels, and other retail locations nationwide from August 2023 through May 2025 for approximately $50.

Importers.Name: Pura Scents Inc., of Pleasant Grove, Utah

Hazards.Name: Risk of magnet ingestion in children due to detachable magnets.

Remedies.Name: Dispose of the current cover and request a free replacement from Pura Scents.

recalls.metaDescription: Pura Scents recalls Smart Home Fragrance Diffuser covers due to magnet ingestion risk. Contact for a free replacement.

recalls.Description:
iHerb has issued a recall for three varieties of California Gold Nutrition dietary supplements: Daily Prenatal Multi, Ultamins Women's Multivitamin, and Ultamins Women's 50+ Multivitamin. The Daily Prenatal Multi is packaged in a white bottle with a white lid and a gold border label, containing 60 fish gelatin softgel capsules. The Ultamins Women's Multivitamin and Ultamins Women's 50+ Multivitamin come in dark purple packaging, each holding 60 capsules in foil. Specific batch numbers and expiration dates can be found on the back of the packaging. 

The recalled products include batch codes 2307050A, 2404096A, and 2411100A for the Daily Prenatal Multi, with expiration dates of 08/2025, 05/2026, and 11/2026 respectively. The Ultamins Women's Multivitamin has batch codes V0532 and V0533 with expiration dates of 11/2026 and 07/2026, while the Ultamins Women's 50+ Multivitamin includes batch codes V0534 and V0536, expiring on 07/2026 and 11/2026.
recalls.Title: iHerb Recalls California Gold Nutrition Iron Supplements Due to Child Poisoning Hazard
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach iHerb toll-free at 888-430-4770, email ProductRecall@iherb.com, or visit https://www.iherb.com/help/contact for more details.

Products.Name: California Gold Nutrition Daily Prenatal Multi

Images.Caption: Recalled Daily Prenatal Multi bottle
Label for Recalled Daily Prenatal Multi
Recalled Ultamins Women's Multivitamin package
Label for recalled Ultamins Women's Multivitamin package
Recalled Ultamins Women's 50+ Multivitamin package
Label for recalled Ultamins Women's 50+ Multivitamin package

Manufacturers.Name: iHerb LLC, dba Madre Labs LLC, of Irvine, California

Retailers.Name: Available online at Amazon.com, Walmart.com, Target.com, and other retailers from January 2019 to April 2025, priced between $8 and $18.

Hazards.Name: The recalled supplements do not comply with the Poison Prevention Packaging Act, as they lack child-resistant packaging, posing a risk of serious poisoning to young children.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should keep the recalled products out of children's reach and contact iHerb for a refund. To initiate the refund process, email ProductRecall@iherb.com with the subject line: 'Iron Supplement Refund' and include your name, product details, and evidence of destruction.

recalls.metaDescription: iHerb recalls California Gold Nutrition iron supplements due to child poisoning risk. Learn how to secure a refund and safely dispose of the products.

recalls.Description: Legend Brands is recalling its Bliss hair dryers due to serious safety concerns. These foldable travel hair dryers, available in teal and pink with silver accents, feature a three-speed setting and a temperature regulation switch. The Bliss logo is displayed in white on the side of the device. The hair dryers pose a significant risk of electrocution or shock if they come into contact with water while plugged in, violating federal safety regulations.
recalls.Title: Legend Brands Recalls Bliss Hair Dryers Due to Electrocution and Shock Hazards; Available Exclusively at Burlington Stores
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers should immediately stop using the recalled hair dryers and unplug them. For a full refund, contact Legend Brands at 888-325-9044 from 9 a.m. to 5:30 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, or email support@shoptrakk.com. Consumers will need to destroy the hair dryers by cutting the cord and disposing of them, then send a photo of the destroyed unit to support@shoptrakk.com. Legend Brands will reach out to all known purchasers directly.

Images.Caption: Recalled Bliss hair dryer - pink

Retailers.Name: Available at Burlington stores nationwide from January 2025 through March 2025 for approximately $20.

Importers.Name: Legend Brands LLC, of New York

Hazards.Name: Risk of electrocution or shock due to lack of immersion protection, posing serious injury or death if the device falls into water while plugged in.

Remedies.Name: Stop using the hair dryers, unplug them, and contact Legend Brands for a full refund. Consumers must destroy the product and provide photo evidence.

recalls.metaDescription: Legend Brands recalls Bliss hair dryers due to electrocution risks. Immediate action required for refund and safety compliance.

recalls.Description: LVOE-branded hair dryers, known for their negative ion technology, are being recalled due to significant safety concerns. These hair dryers, offered in colors such as purple, pink, light gray, and gold, feature various air settings, temperature controls, and come with multiple nozzles. Each unit is labeled with the product name, 'Hair Dryer,' and model number 'X13' on its packaging.
recalls.Title: Recall of LVOE Hair Dryers Due to Serious Electrocution Risks; Available on AliExpress.com
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, please reach out to AliExpress via their online service at https://helpcenter.aliexpress.com/s/BuyerHelp/home?language=en_US&m_station=BuyerHelp, or email us_product_recall@aliexpress.com. You can also visit the AliExpress Buyer Help Center at www.aliexpress.com and click on 'Recalls' at the bottom of the page for further details.

Images.Caption: Recalled LVOE hair dryers
Recalled LVOE Hair Dryer Plugs

Retailers.Name: Available on AliExpress.com from April 2023 through December 2024, priced between $117 and $185.

Distributors.Name: Shenzhen Meili Technology Co., of China

Hazards.Name: Risk of electrocution or shock due to lack of immersion protection, posing serious injury or fatality if the device falls into water while plugged in.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should immediately unplug the hair dryer and discontinue use. Contact AliExpress for a full refund. They will need to destroy the hair dryer by cutting the cord and disposing of it, then send a photo of the destroyed unit to us_product_recall@aliexpress.com or respond to the recall email from AliExpress. The company is reaching out to all known buyers directly.

recalls.metaDescription: LVOE hair dryers recalled due to electrocution hazards. Unplug and contact AliExpress for a refund and disposal instructions.

recalls.Description: AliExpress has issued a recall for its compact mini hair dryers manufactured by XZT Huizhou. These foldable dryers, available in blue, green, pink, and white, feature a white switch with two settings and a thermostatic function. The side of the dryer displays the words 'Fashion Hair Dryer' along with images of two animal faces next to a white 'OK' button.
recalls.Title: AliExpress Recalls Mini Travel Hair Dryers Due to Electrocution Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, please reach out to AliExpress customer service via their online platform at https://helpcenter.aliexpress.com/s/BuyerHelp/home?language=en_US&m_station=BuyerHelp, email them at us_product_recall@aliexpress.com, or visit the AliExpress Buyer's Help Center and click on 'Recalls' at the bottom of the page for further details.

recalls.Description: AliExpress has issued a recall for foldable travel hair dryers available in blue, pink, and purple. These dryers feature a red switch with three adjustable settings and an air-collecting nozzle, with the model name "Guangmei 3858 hair dryer" printed on the side. The product poses serious electrocution and shock hazards due to the absence of an immersion protection device, which violates federal safety regulations.
recalls.Title: AliExpress Recalls Foldable Travel Hair Dryers Due to Electrocution Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers should reach out to AliExpress customer service at https://helpcenter.aliexpress.com/s/BuyerHelp/home?language=en_US&m_station=BuyerHelp, email us_product_recall@aliexpress.com, or visit the AliExpress Help Center and click on "Recalls" at the bottom of the page for further details.

Remedies.Name: Stop using the hair dryer, unplug it, and contact AliExpress for a full refund. Consumers must destroy the hair dryer by cutting the cord and disposing of it, then send a photo of the destroyed unit to us_product_recall@aliexpress.com or respond to the recall email from AliExpress.

recalls.metaDescription: AliExpress recalls foldable travel hair dryers due to electrocution hazards. Learn how to get a refund and safely dispose of the product.

recalls.Description: Nutritional Fundamentals for Health (NFH) has issued a recall for its Iron SAP, Heme Iron SAP, and Prenatal SAP dietary supplement bottles due to non-compliance with federal regulations regarding child-resistant packaging. The white bottles feature the NFH brand name and a blue leaf logo. Consumers are advised to check the bottom of the bottles for date codes to identify the recalled products. The supplements come in various sizes and formulations, including Iron Glycinate and multivitamins.
recalls.Title: Recall of NFH Iron Dietary Supplements Due to Child Safety Hazard
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach NFH at 866-510-3123 from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, email info@nfh.ca, or visit https://nfh.ca/ and select "Recall" for further details.

Recalled Iron SAP Iron Glycinate (60 Capsules 1029U)

Importers.Name: Nutritional Fundamentals for Health (dba NFH), of Canada

Hazards.Name: Risk of poisoning due to non-child-resistant packaging

Remedies.Name: Secure the bottles out of children's reach and contact NFH for a free replacement child-resistant bottle.

recalls.metaDescription: NFH recalls Iron dietary supplements due to child safety risks. Check product details and contact for replacements.

recalls.Description: AliExpress is recalling two models of Multi Styler hair dryers due to potential electrocution hazards. The affected products include the 6-in-1 Multi Styler and the 5-in-1 Multi Styler, both available in light gray or light green. The 6-in-1 model, measuring approximately 16 x 7 x 5 inches and weighing four pounds, features more than three heating modes and has the model number HS01 located on its underside. Similarly, the 5-in-1 model measures around 14 x 6 x 4 inches and also has the HS01 model number, powered by the V9 digital motor and weighing four pounds.
recalls.Title: AliExpress Recalls Multi Styler Hair Dryers Due to Electrocution Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach out to AliExpress via their online service at https://helpcenter.aliexpress.com/s/BuyerHelp/home?language=en_US&m_station=BuyerHelp, email at us_product_recall@aliexpress.com, or visit https://helpcenter.aliexpress.com/s/BuyerHelp/knowledge?categoryId=1000110454&language=en_US&m_station=BuyerHelp&questionId=1061297473&regulation=US-product-recall. More information is available at www.aliexpress.com under the 'Recalls' section at the bottom of the page.

Images.Caption: Recalled 6-in-1 Multi Styler Hair Dryer
Recalled 5-in-1 Multi Styler Hair Dryer
Recalled 5-in-1 Multi Hair Styler Hair Dryer

Retailers.Name: Available online at AliExpress.com from May 2023 through November 2024, priced between $41 and $135.

Distributors.Name: Shenzhen Tianliang Technology Co. Ltd, of China

Hazards.Name: Risk of electrocution or shock due to lack of immersion protection

Remedies.Name: Unplug and stop using the recalled hair dryers, then contact AliExpress for a full refund. Destroy the hair dryer by cutting the cord and sending a photo of the destroyed unit to AliExpress. Refunds will be issued upon receipt of the photo.

recalls.metaDescription: AliExpress recalls Multi Styler hair dryers due to electrocution risks. Learn how to get a refund and safety steps to take.

recalls.Description:
Cabinet Health is recalling its 4 oz. Refillable Medicine Bottles featuring ABS plastic lids due to a potential safety risk. These clear glass bottles, available with blue, turquoise, orange, or purple lids labeled "CABINET," may fail to maintain child-resistance after repeated use. This poses a significant risk of poisoning if young children access the contents. The recalled bottles were sold filled with over-the-counter medications or as empty units through cabinethealth.com from March 2023 to July 2024.

Consumers can identify the recalled bottles by their purchase date and specific date codes located on a sticker at the bottom of the bottle. The recall includes various medication types, each with distinct lid colors and date codes that can be referenced for identification.
recalls.Title: Cabinet Health Recalls 4 oz. Refillable Medicine Bottles Due to Child Safety Hazard
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach Cabinet Health at 908-242-6108 from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, or via email at recall@wearecabinet.com. Additional information is available online at https://cabinethealth.com/voluntaryrecall or by visiting https://cabinethealth.com and clicking on "Recall" at the bottom of the page.

Products.Name: Cabinet Health 4 oz. Refillable Medicine Bottles

Images.Caption: Recalled Cabinet Health 4 oz. Refillable Medicine Bottle
Recalled Cabinet Health 4 oz. Refillable Medicine Bottle
Recalled Cabinet Health 4 oz. Refillable Medicine Bottle
Recalled Cabinet Health 4 oz. Refillable Medicine Bottle
Recalled Cabinet Health 4 oz. Refillable Medicine Bottle
Recalled Cabinet Health 4 oz. Refillable Medicine Bottle

Manufacturers.Name: Cabinet Health Inc., of Washington, D.C.

Retailers.Name: Available online at cabinethealth.com, Amazon.com, and Grove.co, as well as at CVS stores from March 2023 to July 2024, priced between $10 and $20.

Hazards.Name: Child safety risk due to potential failure of lid's child-resistance

Remedies.Name: Consumers should secure the bottles away from children and contact Cabinet Health for a free replacement lid, providing a photo of the destroyed lid as proof.

recalls.metaDescription: Cabinet Health recalls 4 oz. Refillable Medicine Bottles due to child safety risks. Contact for free replacement lids and details.

recalls.Description: SHEIN has announced a recall of Teckwe multifunctional hair dryer brushes due to a potential electrocution hazard. These brushes, featuring a gray and purple design with the brand name 'Teckwe' on the handle, come with five interchangeable heads for various styling needs and measure approximately 11 inches long. The absence of an immersion protection device increases the risk of electric shock if the device comes into contact with water while plugged in.
recalls.Title: SHEIN Recalls Teckwe Hair Dryer Brushes Due to Risk of Electric Shock
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can contact SHEIN at 203-990-1005 from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. PT, Monday through Friday, or email uscsteam@shein.com. More information is available online at www.us.SHEIN.com by clicking on 'Product Recalls' or visiting https://us.shein.com/campaigns/productrecalls.

Images.Caption: Recalled Teckwe Hair Dryer Brush

Retailers.Name: Available online at SHEIN.com from July 2024 to October 2024, priced between $9 and $21.

Distributors.Name: SHEIN Distribution Corporation, of Los Angeles, California

Hazards.Name: Risk of electric shock due to lack of immersion protection

Remedies.Name: Unplug and stop using the hair dryer brushes, contact SHEIN for a full refund, and destroy the product as per local recycling guidelines.

recalls.metaDescription: SHEIN recalls Teckwe hair dryer brushes due to electric shock risks. Contact for refunds and safe disposal instructions.

recalls.Description: The recall pertains to Euqee Wintergreen Essential Oil, packaged in 118 ml amber glass bottles with black screw-on caps. Each bottle features a white label stating "Euqee, Essential Oil, Premium Grade, 100% Pure Plant Extract and Wintergreen," along with safety information and manufacturer details on the back. The product fails to meet child-resistant packaging requirements mandated by the Poison Prevention Packaging Act, posing a serious risk of poisoning to young children if ingested.
recalls.Title: Euqee Wintergreen Essential Oil Recall Due to Poisoning Risk and Non-Compliance with Safety Regulations
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers should secure the recalled product away from children and reach out to DLWL-US for a full refund. For assistance, contact them via email at gzzlhus@163.com, or visit www.euqee.net/page9 or www.euqee.net and select "Recall" at the top of the page.

Images.Caption: Recalled Euqee Wintergreen Essential Oil

Retailers.Name: Available exclusively on Amazon.com from December 2023 to August 2024 for approximately $8

Distributors.Name: DingLinWangLuoKeJiGuang ZhouYouXianGongSi, dba DLWL-US, of China

Hazards.Name: Non-child-resistant packaging leading to potential poisoning risk

Remedies.Name: Return for a full refund with pre-paid shipping label provided

recalls.metaDescription: Recall of Euqee Wintergreen Essential Oil due to poisoning risk; non-compliance with safety packaging regulations. Secure and return for a refund.

recalls.Description: Focusee is recalling the Tideway High-Speed Hair Dryers PRO M01, which feature two speed settings and come with a nozzle. These hair dryers are white with a gold bottom on the handle, and 'Tideway' is printed on the front. They include an LED ring that indicates temperature settings: red for hot air, orange for warm air, blue for cold air, and green for alternating hot and cold cycles.
recalls.Title: Focusee Issues Recall for Tideway High-Speed Hair Dryers Due to Shock Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers should immediately unplug and stop using the recalled hair dryers. Contact Tideway Shop at 209-267-4999 from 8 a.m. to 7 p.m. CT Monday through Friday, or 8 a.m. to 6 p.m. CT Saturday and Sunday. You can also reach them via email at info@tideway.shop or tidewayshopify@gmail.com, or visit https://tideway.shop/ and click on 'Recall' for further details.

Products.Name: Tideway High-Speed Hair Dryer PRO M01

Images.Caption: Recalled Tideway Hairdryer, Model Number M01
Recalled Tideway Hairdryer, Model Number M01
Label with Model Number M01 on recalled Tideway Hairdryer
Packaging of Recalled Tideway Hairdryer, Model Number M01

Retailers.Name: Available online at TikTokShop.com, Shopify.com, and other websites from November 2023 to March 2024 for approximately $170.

Importers.Name: Focusee LTD, of Los Angeles, California

Hazards.Name: Risk of electrocution or shock due to lack of immersion protection

Remedies.Name: Free replacement and disposal instructions for recalled hair dryers

recalls.metaDescription: Focusee recalls Tideway High-Speed Hair Dryers due to electrocution risk. Learn how to get a free replacement and safety information.

recalls.Description: StyleCraft is recalling its Instinct Cordless Hair Clippers, model SC607M, due to potential fire and burn hazards linked to overheating lithium-ion batteries. The affected clippers are available in blue, red, and black, with the model and lot numbers printed on the back. The specific lot numbers included in this recall are 35-22, 40-22, 15-23, 20-23, 25-23, 30-23, 35-23, and 40-23.
recalls.Title: StyleCraft Recalls Instinct Cordless Hair Clippers Due to Fire and Burn Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach StyleCraft at 888-864-6409 from 8:30 a.m. to 5:30 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, email CSteam@stylecraftus.com, or visit www.stylecraftus.com/recall for more information.

Products.Name: Instinct Cordless Hair Clippers
Products.NumberOfUnits: About 50,000 (In addition, about 1,320 were sold in Canada)

Images.Caption: Recalled StyleCraft Instinct Professional Vector Motor Cordless Hair Clippers (blue)
Recalled StyleCraft Instinct Professional Vector Motor Cordless Hair Clippers (blue)
Model and Lot number location on the recalled clippers

Injuries.Name: StyleCraft has received six reports of the batteries overheating or causing a fire, including one minor burn.

Retailers.Name: Available at professional beauty supply stores nationwide and online at www.stylecraftus.com and www.amazon.com from January 2023 through May 2024 for approximately $250.

Importers.Name: StyleCraft LLC, of Boca Raton, Florida

Hazards.Name: Overheating lithium-ion battery poses fire and burn risks.

Remedies.Name: Stop using and charging the clippers immediately. Visit StyleCraft for battery removal instructions and to obtain a free battery replacement. Batteries can be replaced at authorized service centers or by mailing the unit back to StyleCraft using a pre-paid shipping package. Dispose of the battery according to local regulations.

recalls.metaDescription: StyleCraft recalls Instinct Cordless Hair Clippers due to fire hazards. Learn how to get a free battery replacement.

recalls.Description: Southern Telecom is recalling the Lomi Roll-On Waxing Kit, model number LOMB2003PK, due to safety concerns. The affected kits consist of a handheld wax warmer, a wax cartridge, wax strips, a power cord, and a user manual. The warmer features the Lomi logo on its front and packaging, with the model number located on the bottom of the device. Consumers should be aware of the potential hazards associated with this product.
recalls.Title: Southern Telecom Issues Recall for Lomi Roll-On Waxing Kits Due to Fire, Burn, and Shock Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, contact Southern Telecom at 888-959-0944 from 8 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET, Monday to Friday, or email support@customersupport123.com. More details can be found online at https://southerntelecom.com/recall-2024-06-13/ or by visiting www.southerntelecom.com and selecting “Recall: LOMB2003PK Roll-On Waxing Kit” at the top of the homepage.

Images.Caption: Recalled Lomi Roll-On Waxing Kit
The Lomi logo and model number are on the bottom of the wax warmer

Injuries.Name: The firm has received two reports of the warmer's power cord overheating and/or short-circuiting, including two consumers who suffered burns, and one incident of property damage.

Retailers.Name: Available at Ross, DD's, Bealls, and Burlington stores across the nation from April 2023 to October 2023 for approximately $13.

Importers.Name: Southern Telecom Inc., of New York

Hazards.Name: Overheating power cord leading to fire, burn, and electrical shock hazards.

Remedies.Name: Consumers must stop using the waxing kits immediately and reach out to Southern Telecom for a full refund. They will need to mark the wax warmer as 'Recalled' with a permanent marker, unplug it, cut the power cord, and send a photo to Southern Telecom.

recalls.metaDescription: Southern Telecom recalls Lomi Roll-On Waxing Kits due to fire and shock hazards. Learn how to get a refund and stay safe.

recalls.Description: Nutraceutical is recalling Heritage Store Hydrogen Peroxide Mouthwash available in Wintermint and Eucalyptus Mint flavors. The affected mouthwash comes in dark brown bottles with white lids, featuring a pink and white label that includes the Heritage Store logo and flavor information. All production lots of this mouthwash are part of the recall.
recalls.Title: Nutraceutical Recalls Heritage Store Hydrogen Peroxide Mouthwash Due to Poisoning Risk and Non-Compliance with Child Resistant Packaging
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach Nutraceutical at 800-227-6063 between 7 a.m. and 5 p.m. MT, Monday through Friday, email info@nutracorp.com, or visit https://heritagestore.com/pages/recall, www.betterbeing.com/recall, or www.Nutraceutical.com and select "Product Recall" at the bottom right for further details.

Images.Caption: Recalled Heritage Store Hydrogen Peroxide Mouthwash - Wintermint
Recalled Heritage Store Hydrogen Peroxide Mouthwash - Eucalyptus Mint

Manufacturers.Name: Nutraceutical Corporation, of Salt Lake City, Utah

Retailers.Name: Available at Whole Foods, Fresh Thyme Farmers Market, Mom's Organic Market, New Season's Market, Mother's Market & Kitchen, and various other retailers nationwide, as well as online through Amazon, iHerb, HeritageStore.com, and other websites from October 2010 to December 2023, priced around $10.50.

Hazards.Name: The mouthwash contains ethanol at a concentration requiring child-resistant packaging under the Poison Prevention Packaging Act (PPPA). The current packaging does not meet these safety standards, increasing the risk of poisoning if ingested by young children.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should immediately keep the mouthwash out of children's reach and contact Nutraceutical for a full refund or a free replacement, including shipping, based on availability. Consumers will be instructed to dispose of the product. Nutraceutical will reach out to all known purchasers directly.

recalls.metaDescription: Nutraceutical recalls Heritage Store Hydrogen Peroxide Mouthwash due to poisoning risk from non-child-resistant packaging. Learn more here.

recalls.Description: HoMedics is recalling its Therapist Select Massagers, model number HHP-715, due to potential fire and burn hazards. These massagers feature a 120 VAC, 60 HZ power cord and are identifiable by the 'HoMedics' logo on the side of the barrel. The product is black and includes a handle, housing, and four interchangeable massage heads. Only units manufactured up until the end of 2022 are affected, identifiable by a date code on a sticker located on the underside of the barrel. The relevant date codes are four-digit numbers in the format WWYY, where WW indicates the week of the year and YY represents the last two digits of the manufacturing year, specifically 20, 21, or 22.
recalls.Title: HoMedics Recalls Therapist Select Massagers Due to Fire and Burn Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers should stop using the recalled massagers immediately and contact HoMedics at 800-466-3342 from 8:30 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday. Additional information is available online at https://recall.homedics.com/HHP-715 or by visiting www.homedics.com and selecting 'Recall Information' at the bottom of the page.

Products.Name: Therapist Select Massagers
Products.NumberOfUnits: About 46,000 (In addition, about 41,000 were sold in Canada)

Images.Caption: Recalled HoMedics Therapist Select Percussion Massager HHP-715
Recalled HoMedics Therapist Select Percussion Massager HHP-715 packaging
Sticker on the underside of the product barrel with model number HHP-715 and example date code of 4521
Sticker on the underside of the product barrel with model number HHP-715 and WWYY date code

Injuries.Name: Homedics has received 17 reports of the massagers overheating, including one report of a burn to the consumer's thumb.

Retailers.Name: Available at Macy's, BJ's Wholesale Club, Lowe's, JCPenney, The Home Depot, and various other retailers across the country, as well as online at Homedics.com, Macys.com, BJs.com, Lowes.com, HomeDepot.com, and Amazon.com from September 2020 through November 2023 for approximately $100.

Importers.Name: FKA Distributing Co. LLC, d/b/a Homedics, of Commerce Township, Michigan

Hazards.Name: Overheating during charging, leading to fire and burn risks.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should cease use and charging of the affected massagers and reach out to HoMedics for a full refund or a credit towards any HoMedics product, including a 20% bonus.

recalls.metaDescription: HoMedics recalls Therapist Select Massagers due to fire and burn hazards. Stop using immediately and contact for a refund.
